\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb}

\[
\begin{aligned}
x &= \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}, &
\sum_{i=0}^{\infty}\frac{\alpha_i}{2^i} &\in \mathbb{R}, \\
\left\lVert \frac{\partial^2 f}{\partial x^2}\right\rVert
&\leq \boldsymbol{\varepsilon}, &
\mathfrak{g} &\cong \mathcal{L}.
\end{aligned}
\]
